No Poverty.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to poverty eradication or its targets.

Quality Education.reason: The course is a university-level language program (tertiary education, Target 4.3) that develops essential language skills (Target 4.4) and promotes cultural understanding (Target 4.7).
